name: SAM Registry Hive Handle Request
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

SIGMA Title: SAM Registry Hive Handle Request

conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4656 AND "Object Type"='Key' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\sam' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY SAM Registry Hive Handle Request on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4656 AND "Object Type"='Key' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\sam' AQL filter query
